free_text: Fluorine Determination in the near Surface Region of
A large volumee Ge(Li) gamma-ray detector (80cm3)
was applied to measure the high energy gamma-rays. The
low energy gamma-rays were detected mainly by means of
a Ge(Li) X-ray detector (16 mm diameter, 7 mm depth).
